proof fn phi_4_unmarshal_skips_state_validation(obj: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj.kind == PodView::kind(),
        PodView::unmarshal_spec(obj.spec) is Ok,
        PodView::unmarshal_status(obj.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        PodView::unmarshal(obj) is Ok,
{
}
reason: unmarshal succeeds whenever kind/spec/status parse but never checks state_validation — invalid objects (e.g. pods with spec == None) are successfully unmarshalled
